section_summaries.heading: Artificial Intelligence
section_summaries.summary: - Lecture 1 – Course presentation - School of Information and Communication Technology - HUST

section_summaries.heading: General information
section_summaries.summary: - Course name - Artificial Intelligence - Volume - 15 x 2h - Lecturer - Lê Thanh Hương - Department of Information Systems, SOICT, HUST - huonglt@soict.hust.edu.vn

section_summaries.heading: Goals
section_summaries.summary: - Total image of AI - Basic *concepts* of AI - Major *techniques* of AI - Important *applications* of AI

section_summaries.heading: Content
section_summaries.summary: - Introduction - Agents - Problem Solving - Search Algorithms - Constraint Satisfaction Problems - Logic and Inference - Planning - Machine Learning

section_summaries.heading: Reference
section_summaries.summary: - Book - *Artificial Intelligence – A Modern Approach.* Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig. Prentice Hall

section_summaries.heading: Evaluation
section_summaries.summary: - Final examination - 70% - Achievement test - Continuous assessment - 30% - Class attendance, midterm test, short tests or quizzes

section_summaries.heading: Some educational recommendations
section_summaries.summary: - Attend classes - Read the reference book - _Artificial Intelligence – A Modern Approach_. Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig.
